POST /auth.notes: Digest auth-int + bearer token flow validated.

DELETE /config/pending.notes: Can return Non config mode depending on transaction state.

POST /address-objects/ipv4.notes: SDK retries firmware schema variant payload.

GET /address-objects/ipv4/name/{name}.notes: Firmware may return list envelope; SDK normalizes.

PUT /address-objects/ipv4/name/{name}.notes: SDK retries firmware schema variant payload.

POST /access-rules/ipv4.notes: Write validation indicates API not found on validated firmware profile.

GET /access-rules/ipv4/from/{from_zone}/.notes: Direct endpoint can 404; SDK falls back to list matching.

PUT /access-rules/ipv4/from/{from_zone}/.notes: Write validation indicates API not found on validated firmware profile.

DELETE /access-rules/ipv4/from/{from_zon.notes: Write validation indicates API not found on validated firmware profile.

GET /interfaces.notes: Endpoint returns API endpoint is incomplete.

GET /interfaces/name/{name}.notes: Not reachable on validated firmware due to list endpoint behavior.

GET /nat-policies/ipv4.notes: Parser handles inbound/outbound and object-ref variants.

POST /nat-policies/ipv4.notes: Write validation indicates API not found on validated firmware profile.

GET /nat-policies/ipv4/name/{name}.notes: Direct endpoint can 404; SDK falls back to list matching.

PUT /nat-policies/ipv4/name/{name}.notes: Write validation indicates API not found on validated firmware profile.

DELETE /nat-policies/ipv4/name/{name}.notes: Write validation indicates API not found on validated firmware profile.

GET /service-objects.notes: Long built-in names and envelope variants supported.

POST /service-objects.notes: Create may succeed but follow-up command path is not found on validated firmware.

GET /service-objects/name/{name}.notes: Direct endpoint can return list envelope; SDK normalizes/falls back.

PUT /service-objects/name/{name}.notes: Write validation indicates command/API not found on validated firmware profile.

DELETE /service-objects/name/{name}.notes: Write validation indicates command/API not found on validated firmware profile.

GET /dhcp/server/lease.notes: Primary and fallback DHCP endpoints are unavailable/incomplete on validated firmware.
